name: Standing Back Rotation Stretch
shortDescription: A standing twisting stretch targeting the obliques and rotational muscles of the back.
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart and arms out in front or at your sides. Slowly rotate your upper body to one side, keeping hips square, to feel a gentle stretch along your back and waist. Hold, return to center, and repeat to the other side.
steps: Stand tall with feet shoulder-width apart.
Extend arms at shoulder height or place hands on hips.
Rotate torso gently to one side without moving hips.
Return to center and repeat on other side.
breathing: Exhale as you twist, inhale as you return to center.
